name: l2_powered_source_conservation_contract
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceConservationContract records actuator disk force momentum and kinetic power closure targets for future live A4MC powered source executors.
note: Primary powered source conservation contract.

name: l2_powered_hover_wake_footprint
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverWakeFootprint supplies hover mass flow momentum flux kinetic power and wake sample targets.
note: Hover wake footprint dependency.

name: l2_powered_cruise_wake_footprint
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseWakeFootprint supplies cruise skew wake mass flow axial momentum flux kinetic power and wake sample targets.
note: Cruise wake footprint dependency.

name: l2_powered_hover_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSourceMap supplies hover actuator disk force and moment source geometry.
note: Hover source geometry dependency.

name: l2_powered_cruise_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSourceMap supplies cruise actuator disk force and moment source geometry.
note: Cruise source geometry dependency.

name: l2_powered_source_api_surface_audit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceApiSurfaceAudit requires public source term units timing force moment deltas and conservation residuals before coupling.
note: API surface dependency.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream CFD target for future powered source conservation evidence.
note: Upstream CFD target for live evidence.

name: conservation_rule
value: Accept no live powered source result unless A4MC returns source force and moment deltas plus wake momentum and kinetic power residuals that close within the listed ratios while runtime and gameplay remain closed.
note: Audit only conservation rule.
